_description: ISO 23247 Digital Twin Framework Mapping — HPCL PDA Simulator
_standard: ISO 23247:2021 Automation systems and integration — Digital twin framework for manufacturing
_note: Physical directory restructuring deferred to stable release to avoid import breakage. This manifest is the authoritative entity mapping.

observable_manufacturing_elements._description: Represents the physical PDA extractors, sensors, and measured states

files.role: DCS and LIMS data acquisition — loads extractor telemetry and lab measurements

device_communication_entity._description: Standardises data ingestion, pre-processing, and operating-mode detection

files.role: DCS temperature signal processing — calibrates T-profile prediction model
Unsupervised operating mode detection — PCA+GMM on DCS telemetry (Phase 3 NEW)
Shared with OME — also handles ETL, steady-state filtering, LIMS alignment

digital_twin_entity._description: Core physics engine, discrepancy learning, and calibration logic

files.role: Feed characterisation — pseudo-component generation from SARA/CCR/viscosity
PHCT equation of state — propane density, fugacity coefficients
K-value computation and Rachford-Rice flash — equilibrium stage thermodynamics
Asphaltene precipitation kinetics
Murphree stage efficiency model
Entrainment carry-over model
DAO viscosity prediction (Walther equation)
Stage-by-stage Hunter-Nash extraction column solver
Bridges calibration data to physics engine; applies OLS and PINN corrections
3+2-phase calibration orchestration (OLS visc + K_mult optimizer + optional PINN)
PINN discrepancy networks — DiscrepancyNet, PINNCorrector, feature extraction (Phase 4 NEW)
Physics-informed composite loss and training loop (Phase 4 NEW)
PINN phases orchestration — regime detection, forward-pass cache, PINN training (Phase 3-4 NEW)

user_entity._description: Flask API endpoints and web UI — interfaces to operators and enterprise applications

files.role: Flask application — all API endpoints (/api/simulate, /api/calibrate_workbooks, /api/run_diagnostic, etc.)
7-stage diagnostic pipeline and smart calibration workflow orchestration
Sensitivity sweeps and operating margin calculations
Single-page web UI — operator/expert mode, calibration panel, PINN status display

api_endpoints./api/calibrate_workbooks: Full calibration with xlsx upload (enable_pinn supported)
